name: claude-customisation
description: Skills for security review, Next.js scaffolding, Gmail composition, and CLI tool tips

hooks.command: diff -q "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/gws-gmail-compose/requirements.txt" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/requirements.txt" >/dev/null 2>&1 || (python3 -m venv "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/.venv" && "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/.venv/bin/pip" install -r "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/gws-gmail-compose/requirements.txt" -q && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/skills/gws-gmail-compose/requirements.txt" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/requirements.txt") || rm -f "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/requirements.txt"; [ -n "${CLAUDE_ENV_FILE}" ] && [ -d "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/.venv" ] && echo "source ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/.venv/bin/activate" >> "${CLAUDE_ENV_FILE}"
